name: @wippy/wc-monaco
title: Monaco Editor
description: Monaco code editor + diff editor as a lazy-loaded Wippy web component. Auto-themed from app CSS variables by default; opt-in `keeper-dark` / `keeper-light` presets. Single tag with mode="editor"|"diff". Editor emits change events; diff is read-only. Designed to extract to a standalone @wippy-fe/* package later.

wippy.description: Monaco editor / diff editor. mode="editor" gives a single editable buffer (emits `change` with detail.value); mode="diff" renders a side-by-side diff of `baseline` vs `current` (read-only). theme="auto" (default) derives the palette from app CSS variables and re-themes on dark/light flip; theme="keeper-dark" / "keeper-light" force a fixed preset.

mode.description: Editor mode (single buffer) or diff mode (baseline vs current).

language.description: Monaco language id (e.g. lua, javascript, typescript, json, markdown).

value.description: Initial buffer value for editor mode. Ignored in diff mode.

baseline.description: Original side of the diff (read-only). Diff mode only.

current.description: Modified side of the diff (read-only). Diff mode only.

readonly.description: Editor mode only. Diff mode is always read-only.

theme.description: Color theme. `auto` derives from app CSS variables (--p-content-background, --p-text-color, --p-primary-500, --p-surface-*) and re-themes on prefers-color-scheme / [data-theme] changes. `keeper-dark` and `keeper-light` are fixed presets.

min-height.description: Minimum height in px. 0 means fill the container.

change.description: Editor mode: fired on every content change with the full buffer in detail.value.
